description: Recurring architectural decisions that should become policy
example: Always use event-driven architecture for microservice communication

description: Technology selections that consistently work well in this domain
example: PostgreSQL with pgvector for RAG applications

description: Testing approaches that consistently caught real bugs
Process changes that improved velocity or quality
example: Requiring architecture review before epic creation

description: Approaches to explicitly prohibit based on negative outcomes
example: Never use ORM for complex reporting queries

description: Coding patterns to standardize across the project
example: Error handling with Result types instead of exceptions

description: Security patterns that should be mandatory
example: Input validation at API boundary, never in business logic
Pagination required for any list endpoint returning 100+ items

description: UX decisions that tested well with users
Improvements to the development workflow itself
example: Sprint planning should include dependency mapping step
